title: Set of loom files for three Ewing sarcoma cell lines CHLA9, CHLA10, TC71 profiled with scRNASeq at single cell level
author: Andrei Zinovyev
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The raw sequence files were published in  Miller et al, 2020, Cancers  . The files were downloaded and processed using kallisto mapper. 

 The loom files were used to build a  model of cell cycle with switches  and in the development of  scycle Python package .
